channel.title: META — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on META (Meta Platforms) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION META (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position META in Q4 2025 · 11.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: EXITED META (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) exited META in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED META (+78%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added META in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio. 37.53% add — Q4's biggest META buyer.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED META (+50%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 2.9% of portfolio. Big META add — conviction build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Lee Ainslie)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED META (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio. Major META reduction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED META (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added META in Q4 2025 · 13.4% of portfolio. Adding to top position. Tiger Global conviction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chase Coleman)

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED META (-17%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED META (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 12.8% of portfolio. Adding to the compounder.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Li Lu)

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED META (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. Adding Meta.
